chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1712 of 2022 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge(s) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.7741/2022. 2. For hearing of main case. 17.01.2025 Mr. Muhammad Bilal, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Ghulam Asghar Pathan, advocate for the respondent. Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. It is jointly submitted that this petition may be disposed of in terms that the petitioner shall contest the impugned notice before the issuing authority. The department shall determine the notice after providing an opportunity of hearing to the petitioner vide a speaking order and pending aforesaid proceedings, no further coercive action shall be taken against the petitioner. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
